task_completion.description: Open ONLYOFFICE and load the historical enrollment and regional births data.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The ONLYOFFICE spreadsheet interface is visible, containing data from both historical_enrollment.csv and regional_births.csv.

task_completion.description: Calculate historical Cohort Survival Ratios (CSR) for grade transitions and Birth-to-Kindergarten Ratios.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Spreadsheet cells showing calculated ratios for historical years, including grade-to-grade transitions and a Birth-to-K ratio that accounts for a 5-year lag.
A row or column displaying the 5-year average for the calculated ratios. The VLM should look for an average Birth-to-K ratio of 0.90 and an average K-to-1 ratio of approximately 0.98.

task_completion.description: Project enrollment for grades K-12 for the years 2024 through 2028.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A table or section showing projected years 2024, 2025, 2026, 2027, and 2028 with calculated values for grades K through 12. For 2024, the K projection should be 396 and G1 should be approximately 397.

task_completion.description: Calculate grand totals for each projected year.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Total' row or column summing the K-12 projections for each of the projected years (2024-2028).

task_completion.description: Save the final spreadsheet as enrollment_projections.xlsx.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The ONLYOFFICE window title or a save dialog shows the filename 'enrollment_projections.xlsx' being saved to the ~/Documents/Spreadsheets/ directory.

integrity.description: The agent used the ONLYOFFICE GUI to perform the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with ONLYOFFICE menus, toolbars, and spreadsheet grid, rather than terminal commands or Python scripts generating the Excel file.

integrity.description: The agent used spreadsheet formulas to calculate the ratios and projections.
integrity.visual_evidence: The formula bar in ONLYOFFICE shows spreadsheet formulas (e.g., =AVERAGE(...), or cell division like =B2/A1) rather than hardcoded numbers typed directly into the cells.

integrity.description: The agent did not simply copy-paste the expected final answers into the spreadsheet.
integrity.visual_evidence: The progression of screenshots shows the step-by-step construction of the projection model, including intermediate historical ratios, rather than the final projection table appearing instantly.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected output path is exactly '/home/ga/Documents/Spreadsheets/enrollment_projections.xlsx'. The projection years must be 2024, 2025, 2026, 2027, and 2028. Ground truth values to look for in the spreadsheet: Average Birth-to-K ratio is 0.90; Average K-to-1 ratio is approximately 0.98; Projected 2024 Kindergarten enrollment is 396; Projected 2024 Grade 1 enrollment is approximately 397.
